transcript_policy: Transcripts are available for personal use and study. Do not reproduce full transcripts in published content without permission.
summary_limits: Summaries should not exceed 20% of episode content.
commercial_sponsored_disclosure: Host-read advertisements are clearly labeled in episode descriptions. Do not present sponsored content as editorial recommendations without disclosure.
attribution_requirements: Always link to the original episode URL when citing or summarizing.
freshness: Episodes are published weekly. Context packet updated within 48 hours of new episodes.
